description: Pack of three in lavender, green and skin colourLow rise bikini briefs made of 100% premium cotton fabric, has a fashion elastic waistband, low rise styling, full back coverage and printed label on the innerFitLow rise bikiniWash careMachine wash warm at 40 degrees with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowThis set of bikini briefs from beyouty is crafted using premium cotton fabric that provides quick dry breathable comfort. The cut allows free leg movement, the fashion elastic with cushioning enhances a luxurious feel and look, the full back, no pinch elastic and printed label on the inside all provide irritation-free comfort.Model statisticsProduct is a size S on a model of height 5'8" and waist 26" The final product delivered may vary in colour and prints from the display here
